description: Cache-only reads + linearis-via-adapter writes. Loaded automatically when tracking_system=linear.
linearis CLI dispatch adapter for create_issue / update_status / add_comment / set_baseline_commit / list_issues / get_issue.
Repo-local cache engine via linearis (sync / issue <ID> / update <ID> --status / check).

Patches bmad-create-story / bmad-dev-story / bmad-sprint-planning / bmad-sprint-status / bmad-correct-course so that local artifact writes are suppressed when tracking_system=linear. Run after every install or Quick Update.
